0.text: Irregularly bordered mass in the medial aspect of the left upper lobe

1.text: Increased density areas in the left upper lobe adjacent to the mass

2.text: Increased density areas in the lingular segment

3.text: Increased density areas in the superior segment of the left lower lobe

4.text: Increased density areas throughout all segments of the right lung

5.text: Enlargement of nodular lesions with irregular borders and a ground-glass halo
